question: zea crm section 9
answer: ZEA CRM is an AI-powered workflow automation platform purpose-built for the home automation and AV integration industry. The company started as a specialist database and list-building provider before evolving into a full-service CRM and intelligent automation technology company.

answer: ZEA CRM — Smart Home Automation Engine

answer: Smart Home Automation, AV Integration, Home Security, HVAC

question: zea crm section 35
answer: ZEA CRM uses ChatGPT-4 exclusively. Grok is NOT used in any deployment — it is explicitly excluded due to cultural and compliance sensitivity concerns, especially in UAE and Middle East markets.

question: zea crm section 40
answer: ZEA CRM is an all-in-one platform combining a traditional CRM with AI-powered workflow automation. It replaces the need for multiple disconnected tools — MailChimp, Constant Contact, Zapier, separate scheduling apps, and call centres — by consolidating everything into a single intelligent platform.

question: zea crm section 44
answer: ZEA CRM's #1 job is to ensure no lead is ever lost or forgotten. It achieves this through:

question: zea crm section 46
answer: Immediate AI response to every new inquiry — within 5 minutes, 24/7

question: zea crm section 47
answer: Multi-channel automated follow-up: email, SMS, WhatsApp, voice call, social DM

question: zea crm section 48
answer: Intelligent nurturing through the entire sales lifecycle — from first touch to post-job review

question: zea crm section 49
answer: Automated appointment scheduling synced to live calendar availability

question: zea crm section 50
answer: Inbound voice AI: answers calls when staff are unavailable — zero missed leads

question: zea crm section 51
answer: Outbound voice AI: proactively calls leads to schedule appointments

question: zea crm section 52
answer: After-hours and weekend AI coverage — eliminates the need for a call centre

question: zea crm section 53
answer: Machine learning from conversation history to personalise every message

question: zea crm section 54
answer: Works standalone OR integrates with any existing CRM

question: zea crm section 57
answer: Unlike generic CRMs, ZEA is pre-built and pre-configured specifically for home automation and AV integration businesses. The workflows were designed with actual industry practitioners — not generic templates.

question: zea crm section 63
answer: Unified contact record — all emails, SMS, WhatsApp, and calls stored in one place

question: zea crm section 64
answer: AI data enrichment — if lead submits only name + email, AI appends phone, LinkedIn profile, and social handles automatically

question: zea crm section 65
answer: Lead source tagging — contacts tagged by source: Google Ads, Facebook, Instagram, website form, missed call, LinkedIn, referral, WhatsApp group

question: zea crm section 66
answer: Round-robin lead assignment — distribute leads by territory, revenue bracket, or quota (50–60 leads/person/month max before overflow)

question: zea crm section 67
answer: Contact ID tracking — AI references each lead's contact ID and full appointment history for rescheduling and sending reminders

question: zea crm section 68
answer: Manual override — any AI function can be switched OFF at any stage

question: zea crm section 75
answer: Bidirectional sync — send from CRM or Outlook, all messages captured in both. Drip campaigns: 150–300 emails/day with rotation and warming to protect domain health

question: zea crm section 77
answer: Automated message sequences with customisable timing and content

question: zea crm section 79
answer: Outbound automated messages and inbound capture — all conversations logged in CRM

question: zea crm section 81
answer: Answers missed calls after configurable rings. Introduces as AI assistant. Answers from knowledge base, escalates to human when needed. Can serve as after-hours/weekend number

question: zea crm section 83
answer: Proactively calls leads to schedule appointments. Can eliminate need for a call centre

question: zea crm section 85
answer: AI chatbot deployed on client website — collects requirements, gives estimates, books appointments

answer: Lead capture and automated responses via AI agent

answer: Outreach automation supported; Sales Navigator compatible

answer: Inbound: connects to business phone via Twilio — picks up after configurable rings

question: zea crm section 96
answer: Outbound: proactively dials leads to schedule appointments and follow up

answer: Introduces itself: 'Hi, this is [Client Name]'s AI assistant, how can I help you?'

answer: Can serve as main number for after-hours and weekend coverage

answer: Reads the complete conversation chain: email, SMS, WhatsApp, call logs

answer: Scores leads 0–100 based on intent signals, urgency, and full conversation context (not just keywords)

question: zea crm section 115
answer: Output example: '90% — high priority, follow up now' / '30% — warm, keep nurturing'

answer: Helps sales teams prioritise who to call first

answer: Multiple email addresses rotated across a domain to avoid spam detection

answer: All messages personalised by AI — not static templates

answer: Integrated social media planner: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, Meta Ads

question: zea crm section 182
answer: Based on the ZEA CRM Figma workflow diagram. Leads flow automatically through each stage. AI handles follow-up at every automated stage — humans step in only for high-value personal touchpoints. Each stage can have AI switched ON or OFF independently.

question: zea crm section 185
answer: Google Ads  •  Facebook  •  Instagram  •  Website Form  •  Missed Call  •  WhatsApp  •  LinkedIn  •  Referral  •  Cold Outreach

question: zea crm section 192
answer: Lead enters from any source. AI enriches contact data automatically (appends phone, LinkedIn, social handles). Internal notification sent to sales team immediately.

question: zea crm section 196
answer: AI sends initial personalised message within 5 minutes. Follow-ups at 20 min, 1 hour, 10 days, and 30 days if no response. Goal: book an appointment. Messages are contextual — not static templates.

question: zea crm section 200
answer: If lead does not respond to the New Lead Funnel: AI sends a further sequence over 30 days with varied touchpoints across email, SMS, and WhatsApp before moving to Annual Funnel.

question: zea crm section 204
answer: AI checks live calendar availability and books appointment automatically. Confirmation sent to both parties. Reminders at 24 hrs, 30 min, and 5 min before meeting to eliminate no-shows.

question: zea crm section 208
answer: Human-led meeting. AI switched OFF. Salesperson conducts site visit, Zoom, or phone consultation. Notes captured in CRM for AI to reference in future messages.

question: zea crm section 212
answer: Proposal or estimate prepared (integrates existing estimation tools via API). Once proposal sent, AI re-activates: sends confirmation then follows up every 2–3 days seeking feedback or questions.

question: zea crm section 216
answer: AI handles all incoming objections and questions using pre-loaded Q&A bank. Covers: need more time, comparing quotes, partner needs to approve. Escalates to human at knowledge limit.

question: zea crm section 220
answer: Technician assigned. Task checklists tracked. Client receives automatic notifications as tasks are completed. Syncs with project management software.

question: zea crm section 224
answer: After job completion: AI sends review request link. 5-star → auto-posted to Google. Sub-5-star → flagged internally for recovery. Referral request also sent automatically.

question: zea crm section 228
answer: Automatic AMC renewal reminders sent before contract expiry. Payment link triggered on client approval. Covers all clients with active maintenance agreements.

question: zea crm section 232
answer: 30 / 60 / 90-day automated check-in messages post-delivery. Ensures customer satisfaction and surfaces upsell opportunities for upgrades or additional services.

question: zea crm section 236
answer: Leads that ghosted at any stage move here. Monthly personalised email + SMS sent indefinitely. AI voice calls triggered periodically. If lead responds positively, they re-enter the Appointment Funnel automatically.

question: zea crm section 240
answer: For clients in storm-prone regions. Toggle ON when government storm alert issued. System pulls contacts in affected zip codes and sends safety alerts, equipment protection instructions, and post-storm follow-up with AMC upsell.

question: zea crm section 244
answer: No response after New Lead Funnel → moves to Follow-Up Funnel (30-day sequence)

question: zea crm section 245
answer: No response after Follow-Up Funnel → moves to Annual Funnel (monthly touch, indefinitely)

question: zea crm section 246
answer: Prospect says 'not interested' → moves immediately to Annual Funnel

question: zea crm section 247
answer: Annual Funnel positive response → automatically re-enters Appointment Funnel

question: zea crm section 250
answer: AI is ON by default at every automated stage

question: zea crm section 251
answer: AI is OFF during human-interaction stages: site visit, live demo, negotiation

question: zea crm section 252
answer: Client or sales team can manually override AI at any stage at any time

question: zea crm section 253
answer: When AI hits a question it cannot answer, it alerts the human team and logs the gap for retraining

answer: $599 / month — All 13 pipeline stages, full AI agents (voice + chat + scoring), reputation management, social media planner, email campaigns, up to 5 users, all workflow automations

question: zea crm section 354
answer: $499 / month — Core funnels (lead capture, appointment, follow-up, estimation, disposition), up to 5 users, AI agents, basic automation

answer: $97–$249 / month — CRM platform access without full workflow automation. For clients who want to start light

question: zea crm section 358
answer: ₹10,000–₹30,000 / month — Equivalent tiered plans for India-based clients

question: zea crm section 365
answer: $999 — account setup, CRM configuration, 5 automated workflows, AI agent training, team onboarding and knowledge transfer

question: zea crm section 367
answer: $1,499 — all standard setup PLUS API integration with client's existing CRM (Zoho, Bitrix24, Odoo, etc.)

question: zea crm section 369
answer: $1,499–$3,000 — highly customised workflows, multiple integrations, or enterprise requirements

question: zea crm section 372
answer: Setup fee is one-time only. No annual maintenance fees. Workflow changes after onboarding are handled by ZEA with minimal additional charges. Website chatbot deployment is included FREE when signing up for a full plan.

question: zea crm section 376
answer: Workflow automations: NOT included in trial (require development resources to build)

question: zea crm section 377
answer: Proof of concept option: ZEA can build 1–2 live workflows and run them for 10–15 days before full commitment

question: zea crm section 380
answer: vs. a new hire: a junior salesperson costs $2,000–$4,000/month — ZEA works 24/7 and never misses a follow-up

question: zea crm section 381
answer: vs. competitors: GoHighLevel resellers charge $1,500–$2,000/month for similar automation — ZEA is significantly cheaper

question: zea crm section 382
answer: Annual framing: $599 × 12 = $7,188/year — less than the value of one recovered deal in most AV businesses

question: zea crm section 383
answer: Daily cost: $599/month = $19.96/day — less than most business lunches

question: zea crm section 388
answer: Use this section for sales team training, AI agent Q&A knowledge base, and onboarding preparation.

question: zea crm section 392
answer: We already have a CRM (Zoho, Bitrix24, Odoo)

question: zea crm section 393
answer: ZEA does not replace your CRM — it adds AI automation on top via API integration. Your existing data, workflows, and team habits stay intact. You get the automation layer without the migration pain.

question: zea crm section 395
answer: Compare it to a full-time salesperson who costs $2,000–$4,000/month and only works 8 hours a day. ZEA works 24/7, never misses a follow-up, and handles unlimited leads simultaneously. One recovered deal pays for 12 months.

question: zea crm section 397
answer: Break it down: $19.96/day. If ZEA books even one extra appointment per month, the ROI is immediate. We also have the $499 limited plan to start smaller with a lower commitment.

question: zea crm section 398
answer: We need to see it working before committing

question: zea crm section 399
answer: Absolutely — we encourage that. We offer a 15-day CRM trial, and we can build 1–2 live proof-of-concept workflows for 10–15 days. We also have existing clients happy to provide references.

question: zea crm section 400
answer: We're too deep into our current platform to switch

question: zea crm section 401
answer: You don't need to switch. ZEA can run as a parallel automation layer — takes data from your existing system, processes it through our AI workflows, and pushes results back. Your team keeps using what they know.

question: zea crm section 402
answer: AI might give wrong answers to our clients

question: zea crm section 403
answer: ZEA uses ChatGPT-4 — the world's most tested AI. It only answers from your approved knowledge base. If it cannot answer a question, it routes to a human immediately and never guesses. All AI responses are logged for your review.

question: zea crm section 404
answer: I can build my own AI agent for less

question: zea crm section 405
answer: A standalone chatbot is possible, but ZEA is a complete 13-stage workflow automation system: lead capture, nurturing, scheduling, proposals, objection handling, job tracking, reviews, and long-term retention. Building that from scratch would take months and cost far more.

question: zea crm section 406
answer: Why aren't you using AI for your own outreach?

question: zea crm section 407
answer: We do. AI handles our lead research, qualification, and campaign management. We use the same system for our own outreach — UK and international rollout is happening now.

question: zea crm section 408
answer: How do you prevent my competitors getting the same advantage?

question: zea crm section 409
answer: Each client gets a separate sub-account with isolated data and brand voice. We also operate by territory — we do not onboard direct competitors in the same geographic area.

question: zea crm section 410
answer: We want leads generated, not just managed

question: zea crm section 411
answer: ZEA manages and nurtures your existing leads AND we offer a separate lead generation service: AI-powered email and LinkedIn outreach that identifies prospects in your target market and delivers qualified leads to your pipeline.

question: zea crm section 412
answer: Clients prefer the personal touch — they don't want AI

question: zea crm section 413
answer: ZEA never replaces human relationships. It handles repetitive, time-consuming work (initial responses, reminders, follow-ups) so your team has MORE time for high-value personal interactions. Clients only know it's AI if you tell them.

question: zea crm section 414
answer: Compliance risk in UAE — what if AI causes a problem?

question: zea crm section 415
answer: We use ChatGPT-4 only — not Grok or any model with compliance concerns. The AI is trained strictly on your approved content and never speculates. Any unanswered question triggers an immediate human handoff. All responses are logged.

question: zea crm section 425
answer: 3–15 people — large enough to have lead volume; small enough that manual follow-up is a real pain

question: zea crm section 427
answer: $10,000–$100,000+ per project (smart home, cinema room, AV integration, security systems)

question: zea crm section 429
answer: 2 weeks – 6 months — ideal for automated long-term nurturing

answer: No CRM, or light CRM without automation; doing follow-ups manually in spreadsheets

question: zea crm section 433
answer: Leads going cold, owner doing all the sales, no consistent follow-up process

answer: USA, UAE, UK, India, Nigeria, and other English/Arabic-speaking markets

answer: Limited lead volume — ROI is harder. Offer CRM-only plan at $97–$249/month to start

question: zea crm section 446
answer: Migration pain is high. Position ZEA as add-on automation layer, not full replacement

question: zea crm section 448
answer: Works best for consultative, service-based sales with a longer engagement cycle

question: zea crm section 450
answer: Clarify scope: ZEA manages and nurtures leads. Lead generation is a separate service

question: zea crm section 452
answer: If genuinely unworkable, offer limited plan or revisit after demonstrating ROI with a small proof of concept

question: zea crm section 457
answer: Designed for AI agent training, website chatbot, sales team reference, and client onboarding.

question: zea crm section 460
answer: ZEA CRM is an AI-powered workflow automation and CRM platform built specifically for smart home automation and AV integration businesses. It automates the entire sales process — from first lead inquiry to post-job review — using AI to handle follow-ups, appointment scheduling, and customer service across email, SMS, WhatsApp, and voice calls.

question: zea crm section 462
answer: ▸  Q: Do I need to replace my existing CRM?

question: zea crm section 463
answer: No. ZEA integrates with your existing CRM via API — including Zoho, Bitrix24, Odoo, and others. Your data stays in place, your team keeps using what they know, and ZEA adds intelligent automation on top.

question: zea crm section 465
answer: ▸  Q: How quickly does the AI respond to a new lead?

question: zea crm section 466
answer: Within 5 minutes of a lead being submitted — any time of day or night, including weekends and public holidays. The AI sends an initial personalised message and begins the follow-up sequence automatically.

question: zea crm section 468
answer: ▸  Q: What AI does ZEA use?

question: zea crm section 469
answer: ZEA uses ChatGPT-4 by OpenAI. We do not use Grok or other models. ChatGPT-4 is approved for deployment in all markets including the UAE and Middle East.

question: zea crm section 471
answer: ▸  Q: Can the AI answer and make phone calls?

question: zea crm section 472
answer: Yes — both inbound and outbound. The inbound AI answers missed calls via Twilio, introduces itself as your AI assistant, answers from your knowledge base, and books appointments. The outbound AI proactively calls leads to schedule appointments. It can serve as your main number for after-hours and weekend coverage.

question: zea crm section 474
answer: ▸  Q: What if the AI doesn't know the answer?

question: zea crm section 475
answer: The AI will never guess or give irrelevant answers. It tells the client that a team member will follow up, then immediately notifies your team with the unanswered question. That question is then added to the knowledge base for future training.

question: zea crm section 477
answer: ▸  Q: How does the review system work?

question: zea crm section 478
answer: After job completion, the AI sends a review request to your client. If they give 5 stars, it is automatically posted to your Google Business page. If they give less than 5 stars, the review is held in your internal dashboard so you can address the issue before it goes public.

question: zea crm section 480
answer: ▸  Q: Can ZEA send WhatsApp messages?

question: zea crm section 481
answer: Yes. ZEA integrates with WhatsApp Business API. It sends automated follow-ups, appointment reminders, proposals, and payment links via WhatsApp — and captures all inbound WhatsApp replies into the client's CRM record.

question: zea crm section 483
answer: ▸  Q: Is there a free trial?

question: zea crm section 484
answer: Yes — the CRM platform has a 15-day free trial. Workflow automations are not included in the trial as they require our development team to build. We can also set up 1–2 live proof-of-concept workflows for a 10–15 day test run before full commitment.

question: zea crm section 486
answer: ▸  Q: How long does onboarding take?

question: zea crm section 487
answer: Typically 1–2 weeks for standard setup. This includes account configuration, CRM setup, building 5 core automated workflows, AI agent training, and team onboarding. Complex setups with third-party integrations may take 2–3 weeks.

question: zea crm section 489
answer: ▸  Q: Who builds and manages the workflows?

question: zea crm section 490
answer: ZEA builds all workflows for you. You tell us your process, your Q&As, and your preferences — we configure everything. You can request changes at any time and we implement them. Most clients prefer this so they can focus on running their business, not managing software.

question: zea crm section 492
answer: ▸  Q: What happens to a lead that says 'not interested'?

question: zea crm section 493
answer: They move to the Annual Funnel — a long-term nurturing sequence that sends one personalised email and one SMS per month, indefinitely. The moment they respond positively, they are automatically re-routed back to the Appointment Funnel. Many clients come back 6–12 months later through this funnel.

question: zea crm section 495
answer: ▸  Q: Can I use this for existing clients, not just new leads?

question: zea crm section 496
answer: Absolutely. ZEA has dedicated post-sale funnels: Annual Maintenance Contract renewal reminders, post-care check-ins at 30/60/90 days, review and referral funnels, and the Weather Funnel for storm alerts. These generate repeat business and referrals from your existing customer base.

question: zea crm section 498
answer: ▸  Q: Is my client data secure?

question: zea crm section 499
answer: Yes. Each client gets a completely separate sub-account with fully isolated data. We do not share data between clients. Client workflows, contact data, and business intelligence are never shared with competitors or third parties.

question: zea crm section 502
answer: Full Funnels Plan: $599/month. Limited Funnels Plan: $499/month. CRM Only: from $97/month. One-time setup fee: $999 (standard) or $1,499 (with third-party CRM integration). No annual maintenance fees. Website chatbot included free with any full plan.

question: zea crm section 504
answer: ▸  Q: What support is available after onboarding?

question: zea crm section 505
answer: Our team is available 18–20 hours per day across our India and Florida offices. All queries are addressed within 24 hours via email, WhatsApp, or LinkedIn. Workflow changes can be requested at any time.

question: zea crm section 513
answer: 18–20 hours per day across India (Salem, Bangalore) and Florida offices

question: zea crm section 517
answer: LinkedIn, WhatsApp, or email — all monitored by the support team

question: zea crm section 519
answer: Clients request changes at any time — ZEA implements; minimal additional charges

question: zea crm section 521
answer: New Q&As added to the knowledge base at any time — no full rebuild required

question: zea crm section 523
answer: Platform issues escalated immediately; client notified with resolution timeline

question: zea crm section 525
answer: Full team onboarding included in setup fee — knowledge transfer and training sessions provided

question: zea crm section 528
answer: When addressing concerns from UAE or US clients about India-based vendor availability: lead with 18–20 hour daily coverage across two time zones. This directly addresses the most common hesitation and is a key trust-builder.

question: zea crm section 532
answer: ZEA CRM  |  Smart Home Automation Engine  |  Master Knowledge Base

question: zea crm section 533
answer: Confidential — For Internal Use, Sales Team & AI Agent Training
